libmove.banner.actionFailed.defaultMessage: The recovery action could not be completed.

libmove.banner.corrupt.defaultMessage: A library move journal is damaged. Nothing was changed — both locations are untouched.

libmove.banner.interrupted.defaultMessage: A library move was interrupted. Discard the staged copy, or resume after its existing files are verified.

libmove.banner.notResumable.defaultMessage: The staged copy cannot be verified for resume. The original library is still authoritative.

libmove.banner.pending.defaultMessage: A finished library move still has its original in place. Both copies are verified — finishing removes the original.

libmove.error.didNotReport.defaultMessage: The move did not report back.

libmove.progress.finishing.defaultMessage: Finishing — this move can no longer roll back

libmove.reason.appLocked.defaultMessage: Unlock Overlook before moving the open library.

libmove.reason.cancelled.defaultMessage: Cancelled — the original library is untouched.

libmove.reason.destinationNotEmpty.defaultMessage: The destination folder is not empty — Overlook never overwrites or merges.

libmove.reason.destinationRegistered.defaultMessage: The destination already belongs to a registered library.

libmove.reason.insufficientSpace.defaultMessage: Not enough free space on the destination.

libmove.reason.invalidDestination.defaultMessage: That destination is not usable for a library.

libmove.reason.ioError.defaultMessage: A disk error interrupted the move — the original library is untouched.

libmove.reason.journalCorrupt.defaultMessage: The move journal is damaged; nothing was changed.

libmove.reason.locked.defaultMessage: The library is open in another Overlook instance.

libmove.reason.providerBusy.defaultMessage: Finish or wait for the current backup or restore first.

libmove.reason.sourceUnreadable.defaultMessage: The library could not be read from its current location.

libmove.reason.unsupportedFilesystem.defaultMessage: The destination filesystem cannot hold a library safely.

libmove.reason.verificationFailed.defaultMessage: The copy failed verification — the original was not touched.

libmove.results.cleanupCopy.defaultMessage: Both copies are verified. The move is complete; the original could not be removed yet — nothing will be deleted without you.

libmove.review.assurance.defaultMessage: The library ID, keys, albums, and backup links move unchanged. The original stays in place until every byte of the copy is verified.

libmove.review.backupNote.defaultMessage: A current cloud backup is extra safety, but never required — the move keeps one verified copy at all times.

libmove.review.collisionNote.defaultMessage: A folder with this name already exists — the move will use a numbered name.

libmove.review.networkWarning.defaultMessage: The destination is a network volume. Overlook cannot verify locks across machines and database safety is not guaranteed there.

libmove.review.openNote.defaultMessage: The open library moves last: Overlook closes it, moves it, and reopens it from the new location.

preview.unavailable.unsupportedCodec.defaultMessage: PREVIEW UNAVAILABLE — HEIC CODEC IS UNSUPPORTED

restore.local.error.alreadyRegisteredHel.defaultMessage: Choose the registered library from the library switcher.

restore.local.error.notLibrary.defaultMessage: That folder isn't an Overlook library.

restore.local.error.notLibraryHelp.defaultMessage: Choose the Overlook library folder that contains library.db.

restore.local.error.openFailed.defaultMessage: The existing local library could not be opened.

restore.local.error.openFailedHelp.defaultMessage: The local library was not changed. Choose its folder and try again.

settings.general.appearance.hint.defaultMessage: Dark only for now — a light theme isn't part of the design system yet.

settings.general.language.hint.defaultMessage: Changes apply immediately. System default follows your operating-system language.

settings.general.thumbnails.hint.defaultMessage: The grid browses thumbnails, even offline. Cannot be disabled.

settings.storage.disconnect.copy.defaultMessage: This removes this device’s saved {name} authorization.

settings.storage.disconnect.failed.defaultMessage: Disconnect failed. Check status and try again.

settings.storage.disconnect.reassurance.defaultMessage: Encrypted data already stored in {name} is not deleted.

settings.transfer.body.defaultMessage: Pair Overlook with Image Trail through an isolated encrypted provider namespace. Backup credentials and files are never reused.
